nasb.text: Looking about at those who were sitting around Him, He *said, “Behold My mother and My brothers!

esv.text: And looking about at those who sat around him, he said, “Here are my mother and my brothers!

cnv.text: 於是四面觀看那些圍坐的人，說：“你們看，我的母親！我的弟兄！

ccb.text: 然后祂望着周围坐着的人说：“看啊！我的母亲、我的弟兄在这里。

csbs.text: 他环视坐在他周围的人，说：“看，我的母亲、我的弟兄！
